actor.goal: preserve a governed UI sketch projection before any rendered UI exists

story.iWant: a contract for a UI/ASCII sketch projection that is fully described before rendering
story.soThat: no sketch renderer can become a hidden source of truth

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The UI sketch projection is fully described before any executable or rendered UI exists.
The sketch projection points back to a canonical spec, manifest, and evidence posture without adding runtime behavior.
